description: MT field-direction split comparison. LEFT (head shot): steel bar clamped between two contact heads with copper pads, amber current arrow I along the axis, cyan circular flux rings wrapping the circumference, red longitudinal seam flaw on the surface — tag FINDS LONGITUDINAL. RIGHT (coil shot): same bar inside a 4-turn copper coil, cyan axial flux arrows down the bar, red transverse crack — tag FINDS TRANSVERSE. Finale: both indications bloom and a crossed double-arrow ~90 deg badge appears over the divider (two perpendicular magnetizations = full coverage). Reusable wire-vs-coil title panel: cvlWire / cvlCoil / cvlFlux / cvlBend.
